content.json:
## Detection and automation activity
---
Which analytics rules are firing, what they produce, and how alerts convert into incidents.

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| summarize Alerts = count() by AlertName
| order by Alerts desc
| take 20
content.title: Alerts by rule

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| summarize Alerts = count() by AlertSeverity, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Alerts over time, by severity

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| mv-expand AlertId = AlertIds
| summarize IncidentsRaised = dcount(IncidentNumber), AlertsInvolved = dcount(tostring(AlertId)) by Title
| order by IncidentsRaised desc
| take 20
content.title: Alert to incident conversion

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| where Status == 'Closed' and Classification in ('BenignPositive', 'FalsePositive')
| summarize Closed = count() by Title, Classification
| order by Closed desc
| take 20
content.title: Incidents closed as benign or false positive, by title
